blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 23 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 17 ft. Looking ahead, 31 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder. Models disagree — check back.
Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
